steps.title: Separate first and later days
steps.content: The first day costs $300$. If the rental lasts $x$ days, then the number of additional days is $x-1$, and each additional day costs $150$.

steps.title: Write and simplify the cost
steps.content:
The total cost is
$$y=300+150(x-1)$$
Distribute and combine constants:
$$y=300+150x-150$$
$$y=150x+150$$
The answer is A.
